tool.name: flights_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple flight routes on Google Flights in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling flights_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass routes as comma-separated 'from-to' pairs. Example: 'NYC to London,NYC to Paris,NYC to Tokyo'.

parameters.name: routes
parameters.description: Comma-separated flight routes as 'from to destination' pairs (e.g. 'NYC to London,LA to Tokyo,Chicago to Miami')
